summary: Completed frontend testing of UI restructure features: Sidebar grouped navigation, Combined CGT page, Multi-year CGT support, CGT event deletion, and Report Generator risk-colored recommendations. All features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Sidebar grouped navigation - 6 collapsible groups (Overview, Planning, Property, Tax & CGT, Calculators, Reports)
Sidebar groups collapse/expand correctly with chevron icons
Combined CGT page (/cgt) loads with 4 tabs (Events, Holdings, Summary, Calculator)
CGT multi-year support - FY dropdown with 5 options (FY 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26, All Years)
CGT Events tab shows events with trash icons for deletion
CGT event deletion works - event removed and summary cards updated
CGT Holdings tab shows share parcels with add/delete functionality
CGT Summary tab shows Multi-Year CGT Summary chart with Gains/Losses bars
CGT Summary tab shows year-by-year breakdown (FY 2022-23 to 2025-26)
CGT Summary tab shows Loss Carry Forward section
CGT Calculator tab works with entity type selection and CGT calculation
Report Generator page loads with 3 demo scenarios
Report Generator generates comprehensive report with sections (Executive Summary, Income Breakdown, Tax Analysis, Property Portfolio, Investment Projections)
Report Generator recommendations section shows risk-colored badges (Low Risk=green, Medium Risk=amber)
Report Generator recommendations have clickable 'View Details' links
Report Generator recommendation click navigates to relevant page (/recommendations)
Tax Calendar custom event deletion works (trash icon visible for custom events)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - CGT uses demo data and localStorage, Reports use demo scenarios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI restructure tested and working: 1) Sidebar now has 6 collapsible groups (Overview, Planning, Property, Tax & CGT, Calculators, Reports) with chevron icons for expand/collapse. 2) CGT Calculator and CGT Events merged into single /cgt page with 4 tabs (Events, Holdings, Summary, Calculator). Multi-year support shows FY 2022-23 through 2025-26 dropdown. Summary tab has bar chart showing gains/losses per year. 3) Report Generator recommendations now use risk colors (red=High, amber=Medium, green=Low) with clickable 'View Details' links that navigate to relevant pages. 4) CGT events can be deleted via trash icon. 5) Tax Calendar custom events can be deleted via trash icon.

groups: Planning (Budget, Income Splitting, Trust Analysis, Scenario Comparison)
Tax & CGT (Tax Analysis, CGT, Tax Calendar, Tax History, Tax Harvesting)
Calculators (Loan, Monte Carlo, Division 7A, Salary Packaging, Dividends, SMSF)
features: Groups collapse/expand with chevron icons
Active group highlighted with gold color
Active item highlighted with white background
Multi-year FY dropdown (2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26, All Years)
Summary cards (Total Gains, Total Losses, Net Position, Events count)
Events tab with trash icons for deletion
Holdings tab with share parcels
Summary tab with multi-year bar chart
Calculator tab with CGT calculation
Year filter dropdown in header
Summary chart shows gains/losses per year
Year-by-year breakdown table
Loss Carry Forward calculation
Trash icon visible on each CGT event
Click deletes event and updates summary
Toast notification confirms deletion
Recommendations section with risk-colored badges
Background colors match risk level (red-50, amber-50, green-50)
View Details links navigate to relevant pages
Icons indicate risk level (AlertTriangle, Scale, CheckCircle)
Custom events show trash icon for deletion
Standard Australian tax dates do not have delete (system events)
Deletion removes event and updates Custom Events count
